feature: TradeHub Platform Infrastructure Improvements (6 Parallel Tasks)
workflow_rationale: All 6 tasks introduce new functionality or activate previously dormant code. They create new files, new DocTypes, new translation infrastructure, and new UI capabilities. The dominant pattern is feature creation rather than refactoring or bug-fixing.

phases.name: Content Snapshot UX (Task 4)
phases.description: Harden content snapshot immutability in Moderation Case: change field type JSON->Code, add snapshot_timestamp, implement server-side immutability validation, create client-side renderer with XSS protection, and write migration patches

subtasks.description: Modify moderation_case.json: change content_snapshot fieldtype from JSON to Code with options='JSON', update label to 'Content Snapshot (Immutable)', ensure read_only=1. Add new snapshot_timestamp Datetime field (read_only=1, label='Snapshot Taken At') inserted after content_snapshot in field_order.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/moderation_case/moderation_case.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; cs=fields['content_snapshot']; st=fields.get('snapshot_timestamp'); assert cs['fieldtype']=='Code' and cs.get('options')=='JSON' and cs.get('read_only')==1, f'content_snapshot wrong: {cs}'; assert st and st['fieldtype']=='Datetime' and st.get('read_only')==1, f'snapshot_timestamp wrong: {st}'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Modified moderation_case.json: changed content_snapshot fieldtype from JSON to Code with options='JSON', updated label to 'Content Snapshot (Immutable)', ensured read_only=1. Added new snapshot_timestamp Datetime field (read_only=1, label='Snapshot Taken At') inserted after content_snapshot in field_order. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Update moderation_case.py: (a) Add validate_snapshot_immutability() method that compares self.content_snapshot against frappe.db.get_value() on non-new docs and throws ValidationError if mismatch. Handle None/empty content_snapshot gracefully. (b) Add validate_snapshot_immutability() call in validate() method. (c) Update capture_content_snapshot() to use json.dumps(snapshot, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False, default=str). (d) Add self.snapshot_timestamp = now_datetime() at end of capture_content_snapshot().

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import ast; tree=ast.parse(open('apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/moderation_case/moderation_case.py').read()); methods=[n.name for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef)]; assert 'validate_snapshot_immutability' in methods, 'Missing validate_snapshot_immutability'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added validate_snapshot_immutability() method with frappe.db.get_value() comparison, graceful None/empty handling, and ValidationError on mismatch. Called in validate() after _guard_system_fields. Updated capture_content_snapshot() json.dumps to use indent=2, ensure_ascii=False, default=str. Added self.snapshot_timestamp = now_datetime(). Commit: 1f1b9d0

subtasks.description: Update moderation_case.js: Add client-side snapshot renderer in refresh handler that displays content_snapshot as a formatted key-value table/card below the Code field. Must use frappe.utils.escape_html() on all values for XSS protection. Support both legacy flat JSON schema and new _meta/data structure.

verification.command: grep -c 'escape_html' frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/moderation_case/moderation_case.js

subtasks.notes: Added render_content_snapshot() and build_snapshot_rows() to moderation_case.js. Renders content_snapshot as formatted key-value table/card below Code field. Uses frappe.utils.escape_html() on all values (8 occurrences) for XSS protection. Supports both legacy flat JSON and new _meta/data structure with meta header. Commit: 4b7aa18

subtasks.description: Create two migration patch scripts and register in patches.txt: (a) pretty_print_content_snapshots.py - iterate all Moderation Case records with content_snapshot, parse JSON and re-serialize with indent=2 and ensure_ascii=False. (b) backfill_snapshot_timestamp.py - extract captured_at from JSON blob and set snapshot_timestamp Datetime field. Append both dotted paths to patches.txt after existing entries.

verification.command: grep -c 'pretty_print_content_snapshots\|backfill_snapshot_timestamp' frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/patches.txt

subtasks.notes:
Created two migration patch scripts and registered them in patches.txt:

1. **pretty_print_content_snapshots.py** - Iterates all Moderation Case records with content_snapshot, parses JSON and re-serializes with indent=2 and ensure_ascii=False. Idempotent (skips already-formatted records).

2. **backfill_snapshot_timestamp.py** - Extracts captured_at from JSON blob and sets snapshot_timestamp Datetime field. Idempotent (only updates records where snapshot_timestamp is NULL/empty).

Both patches follow the established patterns: copyright header, detailed docstring, execute() entry point, frappe.reload_doc, table/column existence checks, error handling with frappe.log_error, commit on changes, and completion logging. Verification passed (grep count = 2).

phases.name: Contract Automation (Task 2)
phases.description: Create contract lifecycle automation module with 9 functions, activate doc_events and scheduler hooks in compliance hooks.py, and fix contract_revision.json read_only fields

subtasks.description: Create tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/utils/ directory with __init__.py and contract_automation.py containing 9 functions: handle_seller_application_approval(doc, method), handle_marketplace_order_submit(doc, method), handle_seller_profile_created(doc, method), evaluate_contract_rules(trigger_point, trigger_doctype, doc), create_contract_instance(rule, doc, party_type, party), render_template(template_content, context) using jinja2.sandbox.SandboxedEnvironment with jinja2.Undefined (NOT SilentUndefined), sanitize_context(context) stripping {{/}}/{%/%}, check_duplicate_contract(party_type, party, template), expire_unsigned_contracts(). Use 'from frappe import _' for all strings.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import ast; tree=ast.parse(open('apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/utils/contract_automation.py').read()); funcs=[n.name for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef)]; required=['handle_seller_application_approval','handle_marketplace_order_submit','handle_seller_profile_created','evaluate_contract_rules','create_contract_instance','render_template','sanitize_context','check_duplicate_contract','expire_unsigned_contracts']; missing=[f for f in required if f not in funcs]; assert not missing, f'Missing: {missing}'; print('OK - all 9 functions present')"

subtasks.notes: Created tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/utils/__init__.py and contract_automation.py with all 9 required functions: handle_seller_application_approval, handle_marketplace_order_submit, handle_seller_profile_created, evaluate_contract_rules, create_contract_instance, render_template (using jinja2.sandbox.SandboxedEnvironment with jinja2.Undefined), sanitize_context (strips {{/}}/{%/%}), check_duplicate_contract, expire_unsigned_contracts. Follows project patterns: uses 'from frappe import _', proper error handling with frappe.log_error, tenant isolation support, and helper functions for context building and party resolution. Verification passed: all 9 functions present.

subtasks.description: Update tradehub_compliance hooks.py: (a) Populate empty doc_events={} with entries for Seller Application (on_submit), Marketplace Order (on_submit), Seller Profile (after_insert) pointing to tradehub_compliance.utils.contract_automation functions. (b) APPEND expire_unsigned_contracts to existing scheduler_events['daily'] list - do NOT overwrite existing certificate_alerts. The daily list must contain BOTH entries.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "exec(open('apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/hooks.py').read()); assert 'Seller Application' in doc_events, 'Missing Seller Application'; assert 'certificate_alerts' in str(scheduler_events['daily']), 'Lost certificate_alerts'; assert 'expire_unsigned_contracts' in str(scheduler_events['daily']), 'Missing expire_unsigned_contracts'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Updated tradehub_compliance hooks.py: populated doc_events with Seller Application (on_submit), Marketplace Order (on_submit), Seller Profile (after_insert) pointing to contract_automation utils. Appended expire_unsigned_contracts to scheduler_events daily list while preserving certificate_alerts. All 5 verification checks pass. Commit: a2d11d3

subtasks.description: Fix contract_revision.json: Change content_snapshot.read_only from 0 to 1, and content_hash.read_only from 0 to 1. These fields must be immutable after creation.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/contract_revision/contract_revision.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; assert fields['content_snapshot'].get('read_only')==1, 'content_snapshot not read_only'; assert fields['content_hash'].get('read_only')==1, 'content_hash not read_only'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Changed content_snapshot.read_only and content_hash.read_only from 0 to 1 in contract_revision.json. Verified both fields are now immutable after creation.

phases.name: Smart Column Mapping (Task 5)
phases.description: Create Mapping Template and Mapping History DocTypes, build auto_match.py with Turkish normalization and 4-priority matching, and add auto-match UI to Import Job

subtasks.description: Create Mapping Template DocType with full directory structure at tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/mapping_template/. Fields: template_name (Data, reqd), target_doctype (Link to DocType), import_type (Select matching Import Job options), is_default (Check), is_global (Check), tenant (Link to Tenant), seller (Link to Seller Profile), fields child table (Table -> Mapping Template Field). Also create the Mapping Template Field child DocType with: source_column (Data), target_fieldname (Data), match_confidence (Percent), is_confirmed (Check), match_strategy (Select: Historical/Exact/Normalized/Fuzzy/Manual).

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; mt=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/mapping_template/mapping_template.json')); mf=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/mapping_template_field/mapping_template_field.json')); assert mt['name']=='Mapping Template'; assert mf['name']=='Mapping Template Field'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created Mapping Template and Mapping Template Field DocTypes with full directory structure. Mapping Template includes: template_name (Data, reqd), target_doctype (Link to DocType), import_type (Select matching Import Job options), is_default (Check), is_global (Check), tenant (Link to Tenant), seller (Link to Seller Profile), fields (Table -> Mapping Template Field). Mapping Template Field child table includes: source_column (Data), target_fieldname (Data), match_confidence (Percent), is_confirmed (Check), match_strategy (Select: Historical/Exact/Normalized/Fuzzy/Manual). Added validation logic for default uniqueness and global scope constraints. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Create Mapping History DocType at tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/mapping_history/. Fields: source_column (Data), source_column_normalized (Data), target_fieldname (Data), target_doctype (Link to DocType), import_type (Select), confirmation_count (Int), tenant (Link to Tenant), seller (Link to Seller Profile), last_confirmed (Datetime).

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; mh=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/mapping_history/mapping_history.json')); assert mh['name']=='Mapping History'; fnames=[f['fieldname'] for f in mh['fields']]; assert 'source_column' in fnames and 'target_fieldname' in fnames; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created Mapping History DocType with all required fields: source_column (Data), source_column_normalized (Data), target_fieldname (Data), target_doctype (Link to DocType), import_type (Select), confirmation_count (Int), tenant (Link to Tenant), seller (Link to Seller Profile), last_confirmed (Datetime). Includes Turkish-specific character normalization helper and confirmation increment method. All verification checks passed.

subtasks.description: Create auto_match.py at tradehub_core/tradehub_core/utils/auto_match.py with: (a) normalize_turkish(text) handling Turkish I->i, I->ı, Ş->ş, Ç->ç, Ğ->ğ, Ö->ö, Ü->ü case mapping. (b) auto_match_columns(source_columns, target_doctype, import_type, tenant, seller) with 4-priority matching: P0 Historical 100% from Mapping History, P1 Exact 100%, P2 Normalized 90% via normalize_turkish, P3 Fuzzy 70%+ via difflib.SequenceMatcher threshold=0.7. Use used_targets set to prevent duplicate target assignments. (c) save_to_mapping_history(confirmed_mappings, ...). (d) apply_mapping_template(import_job_name, template_name).

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import ast; tree=ast.parse(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/utils/auto_match.py').read()); funcs=[n.name for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef)]; required=['normalize_turkish','auto_match_columns','save_to_mapping_history','apply_mapping_template']; missing=[f for f in required if f not in funcs]; assert not missing, f'Missing: {missing}'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created auto_match.py at tradehub_core/tradehub_core/utils/auto_match.py with all 4 required public functions: normalize_turkish() with Turkish İ/I/ı/i character mapping, auto_match_columns() with 4-priority matching (P0 Historical 100%, P1 Exact 100%, P2 Normalized 90%, P3 Fuzzy 70%+ via difflib.SequenceMatcher), save_to_mapping_history() for persisting confirmed mappings, and apply_mapping_template() for applying templates to Import Jobs. Also includes 5 internal helpers. Uses used_targets set to prevent duplicate assignments. Follows tenant.py pattern conventions. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Update Import Job: (a) Add mapping_template Link field to import_job.json (options: Mapping Template, depends_on: eval:doc.status=='Pending') in column_mapping_section before column_mapping. Update field_order. (b) Create import_job.js with 'Auto-Match Columns' button (visible when status==Pending), triggering auto_match_columns API and showing review/confirm dialog with color-coded confidence (green >=90%, yellow 70-89%, red <70%). On confirm, saves to column_mapping and Mapping History.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/import_job/import_job.json')); fnames=[f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; assert 'mapping_template' in fnames, 'Missing mapping_template field'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added mapping_template Link field to import_job.json (before column_mapping, depends_on eval:doc.status=='Pending', options Mapping Template). Created import_job.js with Auto-Match Columns button (visible when status==Pending), calling auto_match_for_import_job API. Review/confirm dialog shows color-coded confidence (green >=90%, yellow 70-89%, red <70%). On confirm, saves column_mapping JSON and Mapping History. Also added @frappe.whitelist() decorators and JSON deserialization to auto_match.py for client-side API access. Commit: 0c4e23b

phases.name: PWA Compliance (Task 3)
phases.description: Create PWA manifest, service worker with 3 fetch strategies, offline page, icon set, meta tags, SW registration, and Lighthouse CI config

subtasks.description: Create manifest.json at tr_tradehub/frontend/public/manifest.json with name='TradeHub Marketplace', short_name='TradeHub', start_url='/', scope='/', display='standalone', theme_color='#1a56db', background_color='#ffffff', icons array (11 sizes: 72,96,128,144,152,192,384,512,maskable-192,maskable-512,apple-touch-180), shortcuts, screenshots.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; m=json.load(open('apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/public/manifest.json')); assert m.get('name')=='TradeHub Marketplace'; assert len(m.get('icons',[]))>=11; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created manifest.json at tr_tradehub/frontend/public/manifest.json with all required fields: name='TradeHub Marketplace', short_name='TradeHub', start_url='/', scope='/', display='standalone', theme_color='#1a56db', background_color='#ffffff', 11 icon entries (72,96,128,144,152,192,384,512,maskable-192,maskable-512,apple-touch-180), 3 Turkish shortcuts, 2 screenshots. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Create sw.js at tr_tradehub/frontend/public/sw.js: install event (pre-cache APP_SHELL_ASSETS), activate event (old cache cleanup), fetch event with 3 strategies: Cache-First for static assets, Network-First for /api/* and /method/*, Stale-While-Revalidate for HTML. NEVER cache login/payment/escrow endpoints. Fallback to offline.html on network failure.

verification.command: test -f frappe-bench/apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/public/sw.js && echo 'OK' || echo 'MISSING'

subtasks.notes: Created sw.js at frappe-bench/apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/public/sw.js with all required functionality: install event (pre-cache APP_SHELL_ASSETS), activate event (old cache cleanup), fetch event with 3 strategies (Cache-First for static assets, Network-First for /api/* and /method/*, Stale-While-Revalidate for HTML), NEVER caches login/payment/escrow endpoints, offline.html fallback on network failure. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Create offline.html at tr_tradehub/frontend/public/offline.html: Self-contained Turkish-language offline fallback with inline CSS, auto-reload on 'online' event via window.addEventListener('online', () => location.reload()). TradeHub branding (#1a56db theme).

verification.command: test -f frappe-bench/apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/public/offline.html && echo 'OK' || echo 'MISSING'

subtasks.notes: Created offline.html at frappe-bench/apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/public/offline.html. Self-contained Turkish-language offline fallback with inline CSS, TradeHub branding (#1a56db theme), auto-reload on 'online' event via window.addEventListener('online', () => location.reload()). No external dependencies. Verification passed. Commit: 9e56c3e

subtasks.description: Create icons/ directory at tr_tradehub/frontend/public/icons/ with 11 placeholder PNG files: icon-72x72.png through icon-512x512.png, maskable variants (192, 512), and apple-touch-icon.png (180x180). Generate minimal valid PNG files as placeholders.

verification.command: ls frappe-bench/apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/public/icons/*.png 2>/dev/null | wc -l

subtasks.notes: Created 11 valid placeholder PNG files in frappe-bench/apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/public/icons/: 8 standard sizes (icon-72x72 through icon-512x512), 2 maskable variants (maskable-icon-192x192, maskable-icon-512x512), and apple-touch-icon-180x180. All files are minimal valid PNGs with theme color #1a56db, matching manifest.json icon references exactly. Verification confirmed: 11 PNG files with correct dimensions.

subtasks.description: Add PWA meta tags to frontend index.html (manifest link, theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app tags). Add SW registration code in main.js with update notification in Turkish. Create .lighthouserc.json at project root for Lighthouse CI PWA audit config.

verification.command: grep -l 'manifest' frappe-bench/apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/index.html && grep -l 'serviceWorker' frappe-bench/apps/tr_tradehub/frontend/src/main.js && echo 'OK'

subtasks.notes: Added PWA meta tags to index.html (manifest link, theme-color #1a56db, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, apple-mobile-web-app-title, apple-touch-icon, msapplication-TileImage/TileColor). Added SW registration in main.js with updatefound listener and Turkish update notification banner ("Yeni bir sürüm mevcut." / "Güncelle"). Created .lighthouserc.json with PWA audit config requiring ≥90% score, checking installable-manifest, service-worker, themed-omnibox, splash-screen, viewport, apple-touch-icon, and maskable-icon assertions.

phases.name: RBAC/ABAC Role Architecture (Task 6)
phases.description: Activate tenant isolation hooks in all 7 apps, define 13 roles in 3-tier hierarchy, standardize Turkish role names, restrict All role scope, create ABAC DocTypes, implement KYC/AML permission checks

subtasks.description: Create 13 Role fixture files: Platform Provider tier (Platform Admin, Platform Finance, Compliance Officer, Support Agent), Seller tier (Seller Owner, Seller Admin, Seller Finance, Seller Staff, Seller Viewer), Buyer tier (Buyer Admin, Buyer Procurement, Buyer Finance, Buyer Viewer). Create as JSON fixtures in tradehub_core with desk_access and role hierarchy metadata.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; roles=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/fixtures/role.json')); names=[r.get('name','') for r in roles]; assert 'Platform Admin' in names and 'Seller Owner' in names and 'Buyer Admin' in names; assert len(names)>=13; print(f'OK - {len(names)} roles')"

subtasks.notes: Created 13 Role fixture files in role.json with 3-tier hierarchy: Platform Provider (4 roles), Seller (5 roles), Buyer (4 roles). All roles include desk_access, is_custom=1, and hierarchy metadata. Viewer roles have desk_access=0. Updated hooks.py to register Role fixtures. Verification passes: OK - 13 roles.

subtasks.description: Activate permission hooks in ALL 7 tradehub app hooks.py files: Add permission_query_conditions and has_permission blocks pointing to tradehub_core.permissions functions for tenant-aware DocTypes. CRITICAL: For tradehub_compliance/hooks.py, preserve the doc_events and scheduler_events added by Task 2 (phase-2).

verification.command: grep -rl 'permission_query_conditions' frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/hooks.py | wc -l

subtasks.notes: Activated permission_query_conditions and has_permission hooks in all 7 tradehub app hooks.py files. Core: 13 DocTypes, Seller: 18 DocTypes (preserved existing Seller Tag handler), Commerce: 16 DocTypes, Compliance: 25 DocTypes (preserved doc_events and scheduler_events from Task 2), Logistics: 6 DocTypes, Marketing: 7 DocTypes, Catalog: 12 new tenant entries added alongside 6 existing app-specific handlers. All pointing to tradehub_core.permissions functions. Verification: grep confirms permission_query_conditions present in all 7 files.

subtasks.description: Extend tradehub_core/permissions.py with ABAC layers: (a) KYC verification check denying financial DocType access for non-verified users. (b) AML/sanctions check blocking flagged users. (c) Spending limit validation enforcing approval chain from Spending Approval Rule DocType.

verification.command: grep -c 'kyc\|KYC\|aml\|AML\|spending_limit\|spending_approval' frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/permissions.py

subtasks.notes: Extended permissions.py with 3 ABAC layers: (a) _check_kyc_verification() denies financial DocType access for non-KYC-verified users using User.kyc_verified field with 5-min cache. (b) _check_aml_sanctions() blocks users with AML "Hit Found" or sanctions "Match Found" from AML_SENSITIVE_DOCTYPES using KYC Profile lookup with cache. (c) _check_spending_limit() enforces approval chain from Spending Approval Rule DocType with graceful degradation if DocType doesn't exist. ABAC checks placed after tenant match but before tenant admin bypass (regulatory controls). FINANCIAL_DOCTYPES and AML_SENSITIVE_DOCTYPES constants defined as frozensets. Verification: 44 matches (required 3+). Commit: dc34fef

subtasks.description: Create two ABAC DocTypes: (a) Spending Approval Rule - role, min_amount, max_amount, currency, approver_role, approval_type, is_active, tenant. (b) Permission Delegation - delegator, delegatee, delegated_roles, start_date, end_date (max 90 days in validate), approved_by, status, tenant. Validate: no delegation to System Manager, max 90 day duration.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; sa=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/spending_approval_rule/spending_approval_rule.json')); pd=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/permission_delegation/permission_delegation.json')); assert sa['name']=='Spending Approval Rule'; assert pd['name']=='Permission Delegation'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created both ABAC DocTypes: (a) Spending Approval Rule with role, min_amount, max_amount, currency, approver_role, approval_type, is_active, tenant fields + validation for amount ranges and overlapping rules. (b) Permission Delegation with delegator, delegatee, delegated_roles, start_date, end_date, approved_by, status, tenant fields + validation for max 90-day duration and no delegation to System Manager. All verification checks pass.

subtasks.description: Standardize Turkish role names across ALL DocType JSONs: Marka Sahibi->Seller Owner, Satici Admin->Seller Admin, Satici->Seller Staff, Alici Admin->Buyer Admin, Alici Editor->Buyer Procurement. Also update moderation_case.js role checks. Create role migration script at tradehub_core/patches/.

verification.command: grep -rl 'Marka Sahibi\|Satici Admin\|Alici Admin\|Alici Editor' frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/ --include='*.json' --include='*.js' 2>/dev/null | wc -l

Registered patch in patches.txt. Verification: grep returns 0 matches for any Turkish role names in *.json and *.js files.

verification.command: grep -rl '"All"' frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/doctype/ --include='*.json' 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -li 'escrow\|balance\|payment.intent\|commission.plan' 2>/dev/null | wc -l

subtasks.notes: Removed 'All' role from 9 sensitive financial DocTypes and replaced with specific role permissions (Seller Finance, Buyer Finance, Platform Finance). All financial DocTypes verified clean. Note: The subtask verification command (grep -rl '"All"' | xargs grep -li 'escrow|balance|payment.intent|commission.plan') returns 7 due to false positives from non-financial DocTypes (Marketplace Order, Sub Order, Order Event, Seller Application, Seller Tier) that reference financial DocTypes via Link fields but are not financial DocTypes themselves. All 9 actual financial DocTypes have zero 'All' role in permissions.

subtasks.description: Create 11 Role Profile fixtures and register Role + Role Profile in tradehub_core/hooks.py fixtures list.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; rp=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/fixtures/role_profile.json')); assert len(rp)>=11; print(f'OK - {len(rp)} role profiles')"

subtasks.notes: Created 11 Role Profile fixtures (role_profile.json) covering all 3 RBAC tiers: Platform (Super Admin, Finance Manager, Compliance Manager, Support Staff), Seller (Full Access, Manager, Finance Staff, Operations), Buyer (Full Access, Operations, Finance Staff). All role references validated against the 13 roles in role.json. Updated hooks.py fixtures list to include both "Role" and "Role Profile". Committed as 3ed368f.

phases.name: i18n Multi-Language Support (Task 1)
phases.description: Wrap ~703 Python strings with _() and ~100 JS strings with __() across all 7 apps, create translations/ directories with tr/en/ar/de CSVs, normalize frappe._() usage, and add CI linting rules

subtasks.description: Create translations/ directories in all 7 tradehub_* apps and add tr.csv, en.csv, ar.csv, de.csv files. Also create missing ar.csv and de.csv in tr_tradehub. Follow CSV format from tr_tradehub/translations/tr.csv (source,translated,context with # comment header). phase-6-i18n depends on phase-5-rbac-abac (new role names needed for CSVs)
